Peace, Justice and Strong Institutions.reason: The course, 'Diplomatic History of China,' inherently covers the evolution of international relations, including conflicts ('鴉片戰爭'), peace, and the development of international norms and institutions like the '條約體系' (treaty system), directly addressing Targets 16.1, 16.3, and 16.6.
